'''wavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrantly|quadrantly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrantly|quadrantly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wavate|wavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wavatesher|wavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wavatesherĂ«m|wavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wavatero|wavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wavateshĂ«|wavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wavateshĂ«m|wavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwavatero|gokiwavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwavateshĂ«|gokiwavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwavateshĂ«m|gokiwavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowavankerom|gowavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowavankeshĂ«|gowavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowavankeshĂ«m|gowavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowavankeya|gowavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wavaterom|wavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wavatemu|wavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wavateya|wavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwavaterom|gokiwavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwavatemu|gokiwavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwavateya|gokiwavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wavavate|wavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wavavatesher|wavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wavavatesherĂ«m|wavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wavavatero|wavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wavavateshĂ«|wavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wavavateshĂ«m|wavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwavavatero|gokiwavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwavavateshĂ«|gokiwavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwavavateshĂ«m|gokiwavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowavavankerom|gowavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowavavankeshĂ«|gowavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowavavankeshĂ«m|gowavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowavavankeya|gowavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wavavaterom|wavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wavavatemu|wavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wavavateya|wavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwavavaterom|gokiwavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwavavatemu|gokiwavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwavavateya|gokiwavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠvĂŠte|wĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠvĂŠtesher|wĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠvĂŠtero|wĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠvĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠvĂŠterom|wĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠvĂŠtemu|wĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠvĂŠteya|wĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠvĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠvĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafvafte|wafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafvaftesher|wafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafvaftesherĂ«m|wafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafvaftero|wafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafvafteshĂ«|wafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafvafteshĂ«m|wafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafvaftero|gokiwafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafvafteshĂ«|gokiwafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafvafteshĂ«m|gokiwafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafvafnkerom|gowafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafvafnkeshĂ«|gowafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafvafnkeshĂ«m|gowafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafvafnkeya|gowafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafvafterom|wafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafvaftemu|wafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafvafteya|wafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafvafterom|gokiwafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafvaftemu|gokiwafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafvafteya|gokiwafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
